name: All Purpose Seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, blend dehydrated onion into finer pieces.
2. Add the remaining herbs to the blender.
3. Blend all ingredients together until well combined, but do not grind them into a powder.
4. Store in an airtight shaker bottle to keep the herbs fresh.
5. This seasoning can be used on various dishes and at the table as a salt substitute. It is also available commercially as "Instead of Salt" All Purpose Herb Seasoning for convenience.
Yield: 1 3/4 oz or 9 3/4 tablespoons or 29 1/2 teaspoons.
